title: WAL-Backed KV Store
subtitle: Weeks 1–2: Write-Ahead Log from Scratch
description: Implement an append-only log with checksums, recovery on startup, and log compaction via snapshotting.

title: TCP Connection Pool
subtitle: Weeks 3–4: Like PgBouncer, But Yours
description: Maintain a fixed pool of backend connections, parse pgwire protocol, and implement transaction vs session modes.

title: WebSocket Chat Server v2
subtitle: Weeks 5–6: Distributed and Clustered
description: Extend WebSocket server with Redis pub/sub fan-out, distributed presence heartbeat, and message history via Redis Streams.

title: DNS Resolver
subtitle: Weeks 7–8: Recursive, from Raw UDP
description: Build a recursive DNS resolver from scratch studying binary DNS message format, UDP sockets, and TTL caching.

title: Notification Delivery Service
subtitle: Weeks 9–10: Multi-Channel and Reliable
description: Build a reliable fan-out architecture for Email, SMS, and Push notifications with idempotency and DLQs.

title: OTP Gateway
subtitle: Weeks 11–12: Multi-Tenant Auth Primitive
description: Implement a production-grade OTP verification service with multi-tenant namespaces and hashed ephemeral storage.

title: Distributed Lock Service
subtitle: Weeks 13–14: Fencing-Token Mutex
description: Build a standalone service for distributed mutexes using Redis Lua scripts, fencing tokens, and watchdog renewals.

title: LSM-Tree Storage Engine
subtitle: Weeks 15–16: The Write Path of RocksDB
description: Implement MemTable, SSTables, Bloom filters, and compaction — the core of modern high-performance databases.
